options.name: --multiple

options.name: --fields
options.description:
<TEXT>
Comma separated list of fields. CSV only.

options.name: --full
options.description: Write full entities, not only data when exporting as CSV. Default: false.

options.name: --format
options.description:
<IMEXPORTFORMAT>
Defines the output format.
Allowed values: CSV, JSON, JSON_Separated
Use the following format to define fields for CSV:
- id
- createdBy
- created
- lastModifiedBy
- lastModified
- version
- data.name (for invariant fields)
- data.name.de (for localized fields)
- name=data.name (for invariant fields with alias)
- name (German)=data.name.de (for localized fields with alias)

options.name: --delimiter
options.description:
<TEXT>            [;]
The csv delimiter.

options.name: --key
options.description:
<TEXT>
The key field to use.

options.name: --format
options.description:
<IMEXPORTFORMAT>
Defines the input format.
Allowed values: CSV, JSON, JSON_Separated
Use the following format to define fields from the CSV/JSON file:
- name (for invariant fields)
- name=other(for invariant fields from another field)
- name.de=name (for localized fields)
